response.text:
## 📋 8 trigger Commands Found

---

### **1. TRIGger:B:RESET:EDGE:COUPling**

**📋 Description:** Sets or queries the trigger coupling for a sequential edge trigger reset when th

**📖 Details:** Sets or queries the trigger coupling for a sequential edge trigger reset when the Source is set to an analog channel.

**⚙️ Syntax:** `TRIGger:B:RESET:EDGE:COUPling  {DC|HFRej|LFRej|NOISErej}`

**🔧 Type:** both

**🏭 Supported Families:** MSO2, MSO4, MSO5, MSO6, MSO7
---

### **2. TRIGger:{A|B}:LOGIc:USECLockedge**

**📋 Description:** This command specifies whether or not Logic trigger type uses clock source.



**⚙️ Syntax:** `TRIGger:{A|B}:LOGIc:USECLockedge  {OFF|ON|0|1}`

**🔧 Type:** both

**🏭 Supported Families:** MSO2, MSO4, MSO5, MSO6, MSO7
---

### **3. TRIGger:{A|B}:SETHold:CLOCk:EDGE**

**📋 Description:** This command specifies the clock edge polarity for setup and hold triggering.



**⚙️ Syntax:** `TRIGger:{A|B}:SETHold:CLOCk:EDGE  {FALL|RISe}`

**🔧 Type:** both

**🏭 Supported Families:** MSO2, MSO4, MSO5, MSO6, MSO7
---

### **4. TRIGger:B:RESET:EDGE:SLOpe**

**📋 Description:** This command sets or queries the trigger slope for a sequential edge trigger res

**📖 Details:** This command sets or queries the trigger slope for a sequential edge trigger reset.

**⚙️ Syntax:** `TRIGger:B:RESET:EDGE:SLOpe  {RISe|FALL|EITher}`

**🔧 Type:** both

**🏭 Supported Families:** MSO2, MSO4, MSO5, MSO6, MSO7
---

### **5. TRIGger:B:RESET:EDGE:SOUrce**

**📋 Description:** This command sets or queries the trigger source for the A→B sequential edge trig

**📖 Details:** This command sets or queries the trigger source for the A→B sequential edge trigger reset feature.

**⚙️ Syntax:** `TRIGger:B:RESET:EDGE:SOUrce  {CH<x>|CH<x>_D<x>}`

**🔧 Type:** both

**🏭 Supported Families:** MSO2, MSO4, MSO5, MSO6, MSO7
---

### **6. TRIGger:A:EDGE:ENVelope**

**📋 Description:** This command sets or queries whether the A edge trigger will use envelope triggering. DPO70000SX Ser...

**📖 Details:** This command sets or queries whether the A edge trigger will use envelope triggering. DPO70000SX Series only.

**⚙️ Syntax:** `TRIGger:A:EDGE:ENVelope <ON|OFF>`

**🔧 Type:** both

**🏭 Supported Families:** MSO5000, DPO5000, DPO7000, DPO70000
---

### **7. TRIGger:B:EDGE:ENVelope**

**📋 Description:** This command sets or queries whether the B edge trigger will use envelope triggering. DPO70000SX Ser...

**📖 Details:** This command sets or queries whether the B edge trigger will use envelope triggering. DPO70000SX Series only.

**⚙️ Syntax:** `TRIGger:B:EDGE:ENVelope <OFF|ON>`

**🔧 Type:** both

**🏭 Supported Families:** MSO5000, DPO5000, DPO7000, DPO70000
---

### **8. TRIGger:B:RESET:EDGE:LEVel**

**📋 Description:** This command sets the voltage level to use for an Edge Reset trigger when trigge

**📖 Details:** This command sets the voltage level to use for an Edge Reset trigger when triggering on an analog channel waveform.

**⚙️ Syntax:** `TRIGger:B:RESET:EDGE:LEVel  <NR3>`

**🔧 Type:** both

**🏭 Supported Families:** MSO2, MSO4, MSO5, MSO6, MSO7

---

## 🎯 **What would you like to do?**

- **🔍 Explain command:** "Explain command 3" 
- **➕ Add command:** "Add command 7 to my flow"
- **⚖️ Compare commands:** "Compare command 1 and 5"
- **📖 Get details:** "Tell me more about command 2"

**Which command interests you?**
